title: alchemilla splendens subsp. fulgens
intro: Alchemilla splendens subsp. fulgens, also known as the golden lady's mantle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The plant has been used to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders, such as diarrhea, and to soothe skin conditions like eczema and acne. Alchemilla splendens subsp. fulgens can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
